title: Shalem #8004
definition:
Salem = "peace"

 1) the place of which Melchizedek was king
    1a) most Jewish commentators affirm that it is the same as Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Salem = "peace"

 1) the place of which Melchizedek was king
    1a) most Jewish commentators affirm that it is the same as Jerusalem

    NASB:  peaceful, an early name of Jer.
